ns0:entry.ns0:title: [typescript] 777genius/claude_agent_teams_ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/777genius/claude_agent_teams_ui
Language: typescript
You're the CTO, agents are your team. They handle tasks on their own, message each other, and review each other's work. You just watch the kanban board and give high-level commands. Codex/Claude/OpenCode(75+ LLM providers). Build your AI company.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snouzy/workout-cool
Language: typescript
🏋 Modern open-source fitness coaching platform. Create workout plans, track progress, and access a comprehensive exercise database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [plpgsql] guchengwuyue/yshop-crm-scrm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/guchengwuyue/yshop-crm-scrm
Language: plpgsql
yshop-crm-scrm意象客户关系管理系统，专门为企业销售团队量身定制的工具，能够有效的管理跟进客户提供销售业绩，技术： SpringBoot3、Spring Security OAuth2、MybatisPlus、SpringSecurity、jwt、redis、Vue3的前后端分离的系统

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [shell] cfrs2005/claude-init
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cfrs2005/claude-init
Language: shell
Claude Code 中文开发套件 - 为中国开发者定制的零门槛 AI 编程环境。一键安装完整中文化体验，集成 MCP 服务器、智能上下文管理、安全扫描，支持免翻墙访问。让 AI 编程更简单。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [scala] canton-network/splice
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/canton-network/splice
Language: scala
Reference applications for funding, operating, and incentivizing the use of a decentralized, public Canton synchronizer. Includes the Amulet reference application for creating native payment utilities for Canton synchronizers and Daml applications.
